title: Scale
description: Write a program that takes in a list of integers and produces a new list of scaled integer values. The value of each will be the original value multiplied by its neighbors.
input: There will be an unknown number of inputs each on its own line. Each input will contain an unknown number of values separated by spaces.
output: Display the result of each input on its own line, with each value separated by a single space.
source: School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2020, Advanced
